pressReleases.title: Metadise Academy Announces Grand Opening at The Podium
pressReleases.excerpt: Metadise announced its Grand Opening at Level 2, The Podium, Kuching, inviting the community to experience its new space and future-ready learning environment.

pressReleases.title: Metadise Academy Continues to Support HRD Corp Certified Training
pressReleases.excerpt: Metadise Academy continues to support learners and organisations through HRD Corp certified and claimable training programmes.

pressReleases.title: Metadise Academy Expands Future-Ready Training Programmes
pressReleases.excerpt: Metadise Academy continues to provide practical training in AI, cybersecurity, blockchain, digital literacy, and other future-ready skills.
content: Metadise Academy continues to support digital skills development through specialised training programmes in artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, blockchain, digital literacy, and other emerging technologies.
The academy’s course offerings are designed to help learners, professionals, and organisations build practical knowledge for the modern digital economy.
This initiative reflects Metadise Academy’s commitment to accessible, industry-relevant training and talent development in Sarawak.
